# <Feature name>

## Summary

Describe the user value and current maturity: implemented, partial,
demonstrative or planned.

## Actors

List the actors and their responsibilities.

## User flow

Describe the main flow and relevant alternative flows.

## Business rules

List only rules confirmed in code, contracts or approved decisions.

## Interfaces and dependencies

Reference screens, API contracts, modules and external dependencies.

## Security and privacy

Record authorization, sensitive data and LGPD considerations.

## States and errors

Describe loading, empty, validation, failure and recovery states.

## Test evidence

Link the tests that demonstrate the documented behavior.

## Limitations

Distinguish current limitations from future plans.
